name: ReadinessScan
description: Run a readiness-as-code scan and publish results as test cases.
helpMarkDown: Runs `ready scan` against your repository and publishes checkpoint results as ADO test results. Red failures block the pipeline. See [docs](https://github.com/jtwalters25/readiness-as-code).
author: jtwalters25

inputs.name: workingDirectory
inputs.label: Working Directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to scan. Defaults to the repository root.

inputs.name: pack
inputs.label: Checkpoint Pack
inputs.helpMarkDown: Force a specific checkpoint pack (starter, web-api, security-baseline, telemetry). Leave empty for auto-detection.

inputs.name: calibrate
inputs.label: Calibrate Mode (report-only)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Run in report-only mode — results are published but the build never fails. Use during initial rollout.

inputs.name: failOnYellow
inputs.label: Fail on Warnings
inputs.helpMarkDown: Treat yellow (warning) checkpoints as build failures in addition to red failures.

inputs.name: publishResults
inputs.label: Publish Test Results
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish checkpoint results as JUnit test cases in the Tests tab.

inputs.name: publishBaseline
inputs.label: Publish Baseline Artifact
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish the scan result as a build artifact named 'readiness-scan'. Required for the dashboard widget.
